description: Allophonic alternation of /v/ to [w] in prevocalic positions in Armenian. The voiced labiodental fricative becomes a bilabial approximant when followed by a vowel, reflecting a common phonological process in Armenian phonology.
sources: Beekes, R. S. P. (1995). _Historical Phonology of Classical Armenian_. Amsterdam: Rodopi.
Vaux, B. (2015). _The Phonology of Armenian_. Oxford University Press.
Dum-Tragut, J. (2009). _Armenian: Modern Eastern Armenian_. Hamburg: Helmut Buske Verlag.
